CHEA VANDETH

minister, ministry of post and telecommunication

KEY MESSAGE / PRIORITY

This website serves as a comprehensive hub of diverse information related to postal services, telecommunications, and information technology. It includes the policies of the Royal Government of Cambodia, the Ministry’s strategic plans, annual reports, technology management, projects, action plans, achievements, and an information center that allows all Cambodian citizens—especially students, intellectuals, researchers, and journalists—to access the technological information

CamDigiKey

CamDigiKey is the Cambodian government’s most advanced mobile single sign-on service. With CamDigiKey, users can now able to access all digital government services in Cambodia.

Learn More

E-Tax Services

E-Tax Services  is an electronic filing system to provide fast, quick, transparent and convenient tax services to all taxpayers.e-tax services include e-payment, e-registration, e-data, e-uploader, e-VAT, and e-filing

Learn More

CamDX

CamDX stands for Cambodia Data eXchange, which adopts the model of X-Road of Estonia. CamDX is a unified yet decentralized data exchange layer between information systems that offers a standardized and secure way to provide and consume services.

Learn More
